macroTrends.name: Creator Economy Maturation
macroTrends.description: More people than ever are monetizing creative skills directly. 'Creator' has become a professional identity, not a hobby.

macroTrends.name: AI-Native Work
macroTrends.description: Workers increasingly expect AI assistance in every task. Developers and builders are among the first wave.

macroTrends.name: Remote Work Permanence
macroTrends.description: The return-to-office push has settled into a new normal: hybrid for most, fully remote for many knowledge workers.

macroTrends.name: Founder Mode
macroTrends.description: The rise of 'founder mode' thinking: ambitious professionals increasingly identify as micro-entrepreneurs even within companies.
